code:
import io
import string

fn is_ws(_ b: Int) -> Bool
  b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
end

let input = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(input)
mut sum = 0
mut count = 0
mut i = 0

while i < n
  mut skipping = true
  while skipping
    if i >= n
      skipping = false
    else
      match string.byte_at(input, i)
      when Some(b)
        if is_ws(b)
          i = i + 1
        else
          skipping = false
        end
      when None
        skipping = false
      end
    end
  end

  if i < n
    mut sign = 1
    mut val = 0
    match string.byte_at(input, i)
    when Some(b)
      if b == 45
        sign = -1
        i = i + 1
      else if b == 43
        i = i + 1
      end
    when None
      ()
    end

    mut reading = true
    while reading
      if i >= n
        reading = false
      else
        match string.byte_at(input, i)
        when Some(b)
          if b >= 48 and b <= 57
            val = val * 10 + (b - 48)
            i = i + 1
          else
            reading = false
          end
        when None
          reading = false
        end
      end
    end

    sum = sum + sign * val
    count = count + 1
  end
end

let avg = sum / count
println("avg=#{avg}")
